title: Zoomly
description: Lightweight zoom mod for Fabric 1.21.10. Hold C to zoom, scroll to adjust zoom level. Rebind in Controls settings. No dependencies beyond Fabric API. No config, no bloat — just zoom!
body:
Zoomly is a simple, lightweight zoom mod for Minecraft 1.21.10 (Fabric).
Features:

Hold C to zoom in
Scroll the mouse wheel while zooming to adjust zoom level
Release to instantly return to normal FOV
Rebind the zoom key in Controls settings
No config files, no bloat

Requirements:

Minecraft 1.21.10
Fabric Loader 0.18.4+
Fabric API
